title: ecbolium sulcatum
intro: Ecbolium sulcatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, commonly known as the warty ecbolium. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, ecbolium sulcatum is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
